summary: This Standard Operating Procedure defines the Post-Market Surveillance processes for medical devices within the company's Quality Management System. It specifies requirements for periodic safety reports based on device classification and outlines data collection methods from users and authorities. The document emphasizes adherence to EU regulatory frameworks, including EUDAMED reporting and cooperation with competent bodies.
